author: ducktapekiller
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Get the etymology of words in your notes, supporting multiple languages.

manifest.author: DuckTapeKiller
manifest.description: Get the etymology of words in your notes, supporting multiple languages.
manifest.name: Etymology Multilingual

name: Etymology Multilingual

releases.author: DuckTapeKiller
releases.description:
## v1.0.0

**Features:**
- Settings tab with default language selection
- Dictionary integration — save etymologies directly into a note's frontmatter property
- In-memory caching with configurable TTL
- Paste at cursor — insert etymology into your active note
- Copy to clipboard for all languages (previously English only)
- Keyboard shortcuts (1/2/3) in the language prompt
- Loading spinner during searches
